creator: jerry.jacobs@xor-gate.org
text:
(In reply to Artyom Davidov from comment #6)

I totally agree to have two versions of the transmission-* ports, because version 3 and 4 are a major update and can cause problems (also when trying to upgrade). I have not tried to upgrade a version 3 instance to version 4, but runned them separately. I could not find a migration guide from 3 to 4.
